use_cases: Displaying completion percentages or progress metrics in dashboard interfaces
Showing sales targets or quota achievements in analytics platforms
Visualizing health metrics or goal progress in user profiles
Representing loading or capacity percentages in monitoring tools
ai_summary: An animated radial chart component that displays progress or percentage values as a semi-circular arc with smooth fill animation. Features customizable size, stroke width, and duration, with optional labels. Uses SVG linear gradients for a polished visual effect. Ideal for dashboards, analytics tools, and any interface requiring visual progress representation.
